ariaSpec.usage: Announces the checkbox role of the element.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby (when has accessible name)
ariaSpec.usage: The input requires an accessible name to which it will be assigned.
For native checkboxes the checked state is handled by the browser. aria-checked is used for custom implementations.
Points to the hint or error message for the checkbox.
For native checkboxes use the HTML disabled attribute. aria-disabled for custom implementations.
Rendered only when the CheckBox is in a form and announces the invalid state.

kbSpec.behavior: Toggles the checked state. Regardless of the indeterminate state, the key always considers the `Value` of the CheckBox.
